title: Crumbly Citrus Zanzibari Crumble
description: A sweet and tangy dessert featuring crumbly citrus and zanzibari flavors topped with a crunchy oat crumble and dates.
instructions: In a medium bowl, mix together crumbly, zanzibari, and oats.
Add vegetable oil and mix until crumbly mixture is well combined.
In a separate bowl, mix together dates and citrusy.
Transfer date mixture to a 9x9 inch baking dish.
Top date mixture with crumbly mixture, spreading evenly.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until top is golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
